response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced individual contributor with a strong background in backend and distributed systems, but he lacks the executive engineering leadership required for a CTO role. His resume does not demonstrate experience scaling engineering organizations, managing senior leadership layers, or architecting production-grade multi-agent AI systems for complex financial use cases.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed backend systems and high-throughput microservices, such as handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Demonstrated system architecture and entrepreneurial skills as the founder and lead developer of the event-driven GISCollective platform.
Relevant exposure to the financial technology sector through his software development work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Completely lacks executive engineering leadership experience, including the required track record of scaling teams from 10 to 30+ people.
Missing deep, production-level architectural experience with stateful, multi-agent AI systems beyond recent infrastructure contributions.
Career history consists entirely of Individual Contributor (Senior/Staff) roles, lacking experience in organizational governance or managing external delivery partners.
